title: AGRICULTURAL KNOWLEDGE: LINKING FARMERS, ADVISORS AND RESEARCHERS TO BOOST INNOVATION
subtitle: Living labs for supporting part-time farmers
description: A practice abstract describing the use of a living lab approach in Friuli Venezia Giulia (Italy) to support part-time farmers in commons management and the development of a local flour and bread supply chain. It highlights how multi-actor engagement and co-designed tools foster social innovation and environmental sustainability despite economic and educational challenges.
